title: CRE Skills Customization Metadata
description: Schema for metadata.json stored alongside each local skill customization at ~/.cre-skills/customizations/<slug>/metadata.json

customization_id.description: Unique identifier: cust_ prefix + 12 random alphanumeric characters

skill_slug.description: Slug of the customized skill (matches catalog id)

created_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the customization was initialized

updated_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of the most recent modification

base_content_hash.description: SHA-256 hex hash of the base SKILL.md at time of customization

modified_content_hash.description: SHA-256 hex hash of the current customized SKILL.md

status.description: draft = initialized but unchanged; active = content differs from base

change_categories.description: Category tags describing what type of change was made

plugin_version.description: Plugin version at time of customization

imported_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp if this customization was imported from a bundle
